name: EuiKeyPadMenu
description: Grid of icon+label menu items, typically used in popovers.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

checkable.type: true | (DisambiguateSet<{ legend: ReactNode; legendProps?: Omit<_EuiFormLegendProps, "type">; }, { ariaLegend: string; }> & { ...; }) | (DisambiguateSet<...> & { ...; })
checkable.description:
Renders the the group as a `fieldset`.
Set to `true` to customize the labelling, or pass an {@link _EuiKeyPadMenuCheckableProps} object to add a `legend` or `ariaLegend`
